nasb.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘Once more in a little while, I am going to shake the heavens and the earth, the sea also and the dry land.

esv.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts: Yet once more, in a little while, I will shake the heavens and the earth and the sea and the dry land.

cnv.text: 因為萬軍之耶和華這樣說：“再過不多的時候，我要震動天、地、海洋和旱地。”

ccb.text: “‘万军之耶和华说，不久，我要再次震动天、地、海洋和旱地。
